title: The Armed Forces (Jammu and Kashmir) Special Powers Act, 1990
full_text: The Armed Forces (Jammu and Kashmir) Special Powers Act, 1990 सशस्‍त्र बल (जम्मू-कश्मीर) विशेषशक्‍तियां अधिनियम, 1990 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1990-21 Act Number: 21 Enactment Date: 1990-09-10 Act Year: 1990 Short Title: The Armed Forces (Jammu and Kashmir) Special Powers Act, 1990 Hindi Title: सशस्‍त्र बल (जम्मू-कश्मीर) विशेषशक्‍तियां अधिनियम, 1990 Long Title: An Act to enable certain special powers to be conferred upon members of the armed forces in the disturbed areas in the State of Jammu and Kashmir. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of Internal Security Enforcement Date: 05-07-1990 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Armed Forces (Jammu and Kashmir) Special Powers Act, 1990 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Power to declare areas to be disturbed areas. Section 4. Special powers of the armed forces. Section 5. Power of search to include powers to break open locks, etc. Section 6. Arrested persons and seized property to be made over to the police. Section 7. Protection of persons acting in good faith under this Act. Section 8. Repeal and saving.
